title: Looking for Teacher at Meritnation Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at Meritnation Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Meritnation Ventures Solutions in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Meritnation Ventures Solutions:
Meritnation Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meritnation Ventures Solutions!
